trivia: The intercontinental DC-10 carried the widebody revolution to the world with three engines and a center main gear leg. Passenger service is history; the identity endures for the airframes that made it.
That third gear leg under the belly is the -30's signature, added to carry intercontinental fuel loads.
funFacts: The extra center landing gear distinguishes the -30.
Its lineage continued through the KC-10 tanker.
